name: Sauteed Cherry Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat until it shimmers.
2. Add the cherry tomatoes to the hot oil and sauté them, shaking the pan constantly, for about 1 minute or until some of the skins begin to split.
3. Transfer the sautéed tomatoes to a serving bowl.
4. Sprinkle with chopped basil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Gently toss everything together and serve immediately.
This dish pairs well with Rack of Lamb DGP as a side.
